title: knowledge.mjs core: frontmatter parser + concept model + check verb, wired and mirrored, chain green
action: ONE ATOMIC CELL — format core + guard propagation (a split would leave an intermediate commit red on the drift-pins; deliberate, per validation panel + plan.md S1 file order). NUMBERED SEQUENCE, follow exactly: (1) Author in skills/bee-hive/templates/ (SOURCE OF TRUTH) and .bee/bin/: knowledge.mjs (new, both lib roots), command-registry.mjs (add knowledge.check entry, both roots), bee.mjs (HANDLERS wiring, both roots); write skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_knowledge.mjs RED-FIRST and capture the red run. knowledge.mjs per D12: zero deps, emitter-first frontmatter parser (parse exactly what the emitter produces, loud typed failure outside it), concept model per D19/D32 (type + title/description/tags/timestamp/resource? + nested bee:{id,lifecycle,areas,required_context,decisions,sources,lane?,polarity?,critical?,authoritative_for?,review_status?,supersedes?,superseded_by?}), check per D4 (OKF errors: missing/unparseable frontmatter, empty type, frontmatter in non-root index.md, root index.md keys beyond okf_version, non-ISO log.md date headings; profile warnings: type outside D18 nine, missing profile-required field, dangling required_context/supersedes, duplicate bee.id, duplicate bee.authoritative_for; --strict promotes) and D13 (--json {okf:{errors},profile:{warnings},counts}; exit non-zero only on OKF errors, or any finding under --strict). Advisor round-trip guard: parse -> re-emit -> byte-compare, mismatch = profile warning naming the file. check walks ONLY docs/knowledge/ (D23). Test fixtures must include: empty bundle OK; each OKF error class; each warning class; --strict flip; round-trip mismatches (colon in unquoted title, hash mid-value, CRLF frontmatter) = warning never silent misparse; unicode (Vietnamese) titles round-trip; new verb appears in --help --json manifest (test_bee_cli conformance). (2) node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply — syncs .claude/ + .agents/ mirrors and refreshes the .bee/onboarding.json managed-hash ledger (listTemplateLibModules auto-records knowledge.mjs). (3) node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs — regenerates .claude-plugin/ + .codex-plugin/ render trees (test_plugin_distribution.mjs:317-329 byte-pins them). (4) node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write — snapshots the render trees LAST. (5) node scripts/run_verify.mjs — full chain green. Steps 2-5 are the last mutations before the cell commit; the commit sweeps EVERYTHING steps 1-4 touched (all four trees, .bee/onboarding.json, the release manifest json).

truths: node scripts/run_verify.mjs exits 0 — full chain including ledger_parity and release_manifest, not just the new suite
test_knowledge.mjs failed RED before knowledge.mjs existed (evidence in trace), passes after
check on a fixture with an OKF error exits non-zero; with only profile warnings exits 0; with --strict exits non-zero
knowledge.mjs byte-identical in templates/lib and .bee/bin/lib (synced by --apply, not hand-copied)
round-trip guard: a fixture whose parse->re-emit differs byte-wise yields a profile warning naming the file
the ledger refresh (--apply) and verify run are the last mutations before commit; .bee/onboarding.json rides the same commit
prohibitions: check must not open any file outside docs/knowledge/ (D23)
no writes to .bee/*.json(l) stores from knowledge.mjs (D2)
no hand-edit of .bee/onboarding.json — the refresh goes through onboard_bee.mjs --apply
never author .bee/bin/lib directly — templates/lib is the source of truth, --apply syncs

trace.outcome: OKF S1 format core: knowledge.mjs (emitter-first parser + concept model + two-level check with round-trip guard) wired as bee knowledge check in both lib roots, mirrors/renders/ledger/manifest refreshed, RED-first suite green, full 61-suite chain green
deviations: Edited skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs (not in the declared files list, reserved before writing): the cell requires the new knowledge group to pass test_bee_cli conformance, and that suite hardcodes group allowlists, the DA5 bijection GROUP_NAMES probe list, and an every-entry-example-executed coverage check — added 'knowledge' to the three lists and one knowledge.check example execution. The mirrored copies under .claude/skills/, .agents/skills/, .claude-plugin/, .codex-plugin/ followed via onboard --apply + render (those trees are in the declared files list).
